summary: WeakMap caching overhead exceeds benefit. 10-run avg: cached 719935 vs baseline 715196 (0.66%). Extended test baseline faster: 760649 vs 751880. Tests pass but below 1% threshold.
Added fast path for single argument case, avoiding Array allocation. 10-run avg: optimized 731953 vs baseline 718422 (1.88% improvement). All tests pass.

Replacing manual loop with Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments) reduced performance from 676,000 to 656,455 ops/sec (~2.9% regression). The manual loop with pre-allocated array is actually faster than slice.call() for small argument counts in modern V8.
